### Planning Intelligence Log (re-run)

- **Web research (Step 2.6)**: not triggered
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: none (all dependencies closed, no external integrations introduced)
- **Scenario analysis (Step 2.75)**: triggered — 9 surviving scenarios, 4 filtered
  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 9 (6 high, 3 medium)
  - Key findings accepted: CACHE_MISSING retry cap, scope-split precedence rule, SUB-AGENT-GUARD fallback path, atomic agent routing, Figma SVG config-gating, worktree-safe artifact paths
- **Practitioner-requested additional cycles**: scenario analysis re-run 1 time (re-run requested to recover lost original adversarial review findings)
- **Follow-on scrutiny (Step 0)**: not triggered
- **Feasibility resolution (Step 2.5)**: not triggered
- **LLM-instruction signal (Step 5)**: triggered — keywords: agent definitions, skill files (bot-psychologist not re-dispatched; existing comments confirm original run covered this)
